name: fan-marketplace
description: AI Skill registry for agricultural bioinformatics - discover, install, and share modular AI coding agent skills for plant breeding and genomics analysis

plugins.name: fan-skill
plugins.description: AI-powered plant bioinformatics and breeding analysis engine. From biological question to publication-ready results - consultation, analysis, interpretation, and visualization. Knowledge-base driven with B+C dual-mode decision architecture for genomics, transcriptomics, phylogeny, GWAS, and genomic selection.
